name: vincenzo
description: A Korean-Italian mafia lawyer who returns to Korea to recover hidden gold, but ends up battling a ruthless conglomerate with cunning strategy.

name: my demon
description: A cold-hearted demon loses his powers after becoming entangled with a sharp, wealthy heiress, leading to dangerous enemies, and unexpected romance.

name: lovely runner
description: After her favorite idol dies tragically, a devoted fan travels back in time to save him, rewriting fate and discovering love along the way.

name: the sound of magic
description: A struggling high school girl who meets a mysterious magician who lives in an abandoned amusement park, leading her to confront reality, heal past wounds, and rediscover hope.

name: backstreet rookie
description: A kind convenience store manager whose life turns chaotic when a bold, unpredictable young woman from his past becomes his part-time employee.

name: kingdom
description: A crown prince uncovers a mysterious plague turning people into zombies, while fighting political conspiracies threatening the Joseon kingdom.

name: start up
description: A quirky startup team navigates love, friendship, and fierce competition, racing against time to turn bold ideas into success in Seoul’s tech-driven world.

name: flex X Cop
description: A wealthy heir who unexpectedly becomes a detective and partners with a tough female detective who clashes with his methods—but together they make an unexpectedly effective crime-fighting team.

name: sweet home
description: Neighbors confront terrifying secrets within their apartment, forcing them to face fears, protect loved ones, and navigate unexpected challenges that change their lives forever.

name: revenge of others
description: A determined young woman transfers to her brother’s school to uncover the truth behind his mysterious death, joining forces with a student whose own secrets fuel a dangerous quest for justice.

name: moving
description: Teenagers with hidden superpowers fight to survive while their secretive parents confront a dangerous past that refuses to stay buried.

name: high school return of a gangster
description: A feared gangster wakes up in a bullied teen’s body, and flips the school’s power game with ruthless charm and unexpected heart.

name: extracurricular
description: A model student hides a dark secret, running a criminal side hustle that spirals into danger, moral dilemmas, and unexpected consequences.

name: the silent sea
description: On a mysterious moon mission, a team faces life-threatening secrets, testing trust, courage, and the limits of human survival.

name: gyeongseong creature
description: In 1945 Gyeongseong, two survivors confront monstrous creatures and human corruption, battling fear, vengeance, and a city on the edge of chaos.

name: school 2017
description: Hign school students navigate friendship, rivalry, and the pressures of education, discovering love, resilience, and the courage to stand up for themselves.

name: hierarchy
description: At elite Jooshin High, the powerful dominate, until a mysterious scholarship student shakes up power, secrets, revenge, and rivalries.

name: nevertheless
description: Sparks fly between two art students—one cautious, one flirty—as they navigate attraction, heartbreak, and complicated emotions.

name: w: two worlds
description: A surgeon gets pulled into a webtoon universe, blurring reality and fiction as she teams up with its hero to survive and uncover secrets.

name: song of the bandits
description: Lawless bandits unite in Gando region to protect their homeland and loved ones against fierce odds.

name: cheer up
description: A struggling high school cheer squad learns teamwork, friendship, and self-confidence while chasing dreams and overcoming personal and social challenges.

name: black knight
description: In a polluted dystopian 2071, a legendary deliveryman fights ruthless elites to keep hope alive, protect the vulnerable, and defy a cruel world order.

name: business proposal
description: A quirky romance unfolds when a woman impersonates a friend on a blind date, only to unknowingly meet her company’s CEO.

name: school 2015
description: Twin sisters separated in childhood end up swapping lives when the bullied, orphaned sister is mistaken for her popular twin at elite Sekang High.

name: doona
description: A former K-pop idol starts a new chapter living with a college student, sparking unexpected friendship, growth, and romance.

name: extraordinary you
description: A self-aware high school girl discovers she’s a side character in a comic and risks everything to rewrite her fate and choose her own love story.

name: the good bad mother
description: When an accident leaves her ambitious son with a childlike mind, a hardened mother confronts her past while rebuilding love, family, and second chances together.

name: pinocchio
description: A young woman who hiccups when she lies fights for honesty in a ruthless newsroom, while a man hiding his identity fights to clear his family’s name.

name: bloodhounds
description: Two determined young boxers team up with a savvy lender to take down ruthless loan sharks, risking everything to protect innocent lives from debt traps.

name: my name
description: A woman infiltrates a powerful crime syndicate to avenge her father’s murder, uncovering dark secrets while facing trust, betrayal, and the heavy cost of revenge.

name: please don't date him
description: A tech‑savvy woman accidentally creates an AI fridge that flags bad men, upending her love life when a mysterious firefighter with no digital trace appears.

name: the glory
description: A woman meticulously plots revenge against the classmates who ruined her youth, risking everything to confront their cruelty and reclaim the life they stole from her.

name: love alarm
description: In a world where an app reveals who likes you, teenagers navigate love, jealousy, and the complicated, unpredictable twists of teenage relationships.

name: monstrous
description: A cursed Buddhist statue unleashes terrifying phenomena on a small town, compelling a determined detective and others to confront supernatural horrors and unravel the mystery.

name: hellbound
description: Mysterious beings appear to condemn people to hell, sparking fear, chaos, and the rise of a fanatical cult as society struggles with morality, justice, and fate.

name: duty after school
description: High school students are recruited for covert missions, juggling classes and deadly assignments while confronting danger, loyalty, and the harsh realities of their secret duties.

name: narco saints
description: A suave businessman gets entangled in a dangerous drug empire in Suriname, forced to collaborate with Korean intelligence to take down a ruthless cartel boss.

name: the 8 show
description: Eight strangers trapped in a mysterious tower compete in a twisted time-based survival game, where every minute earns money—and greed slowly shatters trust between them.

name: the frog
description: A quiet man’s life unravels after a mysterious woman arrives at his remote lodge, dragging him into a chilling spiral of secrets, suspicion, and murder.

name: night has come
description: A school trip turns deadly when classmates are forced into a real‑life mafia survival game, sparking paranoia, betrayal, and desperate fights to stay alive.

name: squid game
description: A mysterious invitation lures desperate players into deadly childhood games, where each round brings massive rewards—or a horrifying death.

name: weak hero
description: A quiet, unassuming high school student uses his brains and fists to take down bullies, and fight against violence.

name: happiness
description: Residents of a high-rise fight to survive as a deadly virus spreads, exposing fear, greed, and the fragile bonds between neighbors.

name: death's game
description: A man punished by Death must live through 12 reincarnations and beat death in each life to earn a second chance at real life.

name: crash landing on you
description: A South Korean heiress accidentally paraglides into North Korea, where a compassionate officer hides her, sparking a forbidden romance across enemy lines.

name: move to heaven
description: Two estranged relatives run a trauma-cleaning business, uncovering untold stories of the deceased while healing their own emotional wounds along the way.

name: study group
description: A fighting‑skilled student at a rough high school forms a study group to chase college dreams, defending friends against bullies and chaos with grit and heart.

name: the witch
description: People believe she is cursed and call her a “witch” after a series of mysterious deaths, until a former classmate digs into her past, seeking truth, love, and redemption.

name: newtopia
description: A recently broken‑up couple must fight through a chaotic zombie outbreak in Seoul, battling undead hordes as they race to reunite with laughter, love, and survival on the line.

name: twinkling watermelon
description: A music-loving teen time-travels to 1995, forms a band with his young father, and rewrites love, family, and destiny.

name: zombie detective
description: A resurrected man with fading memories struggles to blend into society, teaming up with a writer to solve crimes while uncovering his mysterious past.

name: boyhood
description: A timid nobody’s sudden rise as the toughest kid in school sparks chaos, forcing him to survive rival gangs, shifting loyalties, and first love.

name: mercy for none
description: A former enforcer returns to the shadows he escaped, igniting a relentless revenge spree that exposes betrayal, buried secrets, and the true cost of violence.

name: one: high school heroes
description: A group of underestimated students secretly band together to fight bullies and corruption, turning their school into a battleground for justice.

name: sline
description: An ordinary woman with an uncanny ability to see invisible red lines linking people to their past lovers becomes entangled in secrets, and dangerous truths.

name: strangers from hell
description: A naive city dweller moves into a cheap apartment, only to discover her neighbors twisted secrets that threaten her sanity and survival.

name: head over heals
description: A high school shaman foresees her first love’s tragic fate and risks everything to change destiny, navigating love, danger, and the twists of fate.

name: bon appétit, your majesty
description: A modern chef is transported to the Joseon era, cooking for a demanding king while navigating palace politics, unexpected bonds, and a taste of forbidden romance.

name: bitch x rich
description: A scholarship student becomes entangled in a dangerous web of privilege and betrayal at an elite school, challenging the untouchable queen who rules its hierarchy.

name: genie make a wish
description: When a mysterious genie appears, an emotionless woman’s life turns magical and chaotic as they navigate wishes, destiny, and unexpected romance.

name: cashero
description: An ordinary civil servant suddenly gains cash‑dependent superpowers, forcing him to choose between saving others and surviving financially

name: mouse
description: A rookie cop confronts a terrifying serial killer, uncovering dark secrets about psychopathy, human nature, and the blurred line between good and evil.

name: the art of sarah
description: A mysterious woman builds a fake luxury life, but when a body linked to her persona is found, a dogged detective peels back layers of deception and identity

name: the manipulated
description: An ordinary man framed for a brutal crime fights back, igniting a relentless battle of revenge and manipulation against the powerful mastermind who shattered his life.
